description: Second largest private healthcare provider in Finland offering occupational health, primary care, and specialist services. Strong focus on digital health and telemedicine. Also operates in Sweden.
business_model: B2B2C - Occupational health contracts; B2C individual services
target_market: Finnish and Swedish employers and individuals
competitive_advantage: Long history, Nordic presence, comprehensive services, digital innovation

varden_fit.rationale: Major competitor in Finland and Sweden - established player with Nordic reach
